ST.xhtml: lControllerBMSA REF= controllerBMSA; lControllerBMSB REF= controllerBMSB;

documentation.xhtml: foobar why is this defaulting to true, CATL bug
lDischargeEnergy: EnergyMetric; foostrip lChargeEnergy: EnergyMetric; foostrip
foobar changed from 48, CATL needs to allow higher values

ST.xhtml: // convert from percentage to rpm throttleToVelocity := throttle*lMaximumVelocity;
// convert from rpm to percentage velocityToThrottle := MAX(-1.0,MIN(velocity/lMaximumVelocity,1.0));
IF ((NOT(Stalled)) AND (lStallState=cStallStateClearing)) THEN lStallState := cStallStateNone; END_IF
// returns as RPM not as Hz TargetSpeed := lTargetSpeed.Value;
lAngle.InputReference REF= angle; lAngularVelocity.InputReference REF= velocity;
lPackProvider.initializePackProvider(packIn1, packIn2, packIn3, packIn4, packIn5, packIn6, packIn7, packIn8, packOut1, packOut2, packOut3, packOut4, packOut5, packOut6, packOut7, packOut8);

StartCondition := ((gSystemPrimary.Steering.CurrentMode=lSteerModeRequired) AND (gSystemPrimary.Steering.OK) AND (gSystemPrimary.UInterface.AutomationStart) AND ((gSystemPrimary.Travel.CurrentDirection=cDirectionStationary) OR ((gSystemPrimary.Travel.CurrentDirection=cDirectionForward) AND (lTravelThrottle>0.0)) OR ((gSystemPrimary.Travel.CurrentDirection=cDirectionReverse) AND (lTravelThrottle<0.0))));

documentation.xhtml: implies min throttle (* increased from 0.010 from 0.005 from 0.0025 *)
max throttle of 0.54, increased from -6.0 to -7.0 for elextric, up to -14 for hydraulic m190 *)
implies max throttle, limits magnitude of correction, should not saturate the drive
limit on when to halt the system, increase from 0.1, control should be stable 99.9999% of the time under normal operation

ST.xhtml: ControllerSteerAngle ref= lControllerSteerAngle; // foobar remove property?

documentation.xhtml: limit on how far away the target can be pushed

ST.xhtml:
Topbeam := 0;
IF ((Active) AND (gSystemPrimary.FunctionalModeControl.CurrentMode=cFunctionalModeTopbeamConfiguration) AND (gSystemPrimary.FunctionalModeControl.Active) AND (InputMode=cInputModeTopbeamConfiguration)) THEN Topbeam := lControllerUInterfaceRadio.RightRotation; END_IF
IF ((lEnableUIOrientation) AND (UIOrientation<>cUIOrientationNone)) THEN lUIOrientation := UIOrientation; END_IF
lState.OutputReference REF= state; lColor.OutputReference REF= color;

Library.Name: STW ESX-3CS BIOS, 1.1.3.0 (STW - Sensor-Technik Wiedemann GmbH)
